name: AWS Serverless Lambda HTTP API
description: Deploys a serverless REST API using AWS Lambda and API Gateway HTTP API, with configurable IAM execution roles, custom environment variables, and CloudWatch logs.
architectureSummary: Sets up an API Gateway HTTP API (v2) routing all requests (`ANY /{proxy+}`) to a backend Lambda function. Creates a CloudWatch Log Group for Lambda logs and configures basic IAM roles with execution permissions. Includes option to pass environment variables.
securityNotes: The Lambda function is executed using an IAM role scoped to the bare minimum permissions (writing logs to CloudWatch). The HTTP API has CORS enabled by default to allow cross-origin requests. Environment variables can optionally contain configuration secrets.

versions.changelog: Initial release with API Gateway HTTP API, Lambda function, basic IAM role, and environment variables mapping.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy the API into.

inputs.name: handler
inputs.label: Lambda Handler
inputs.description: The entry point in your code (e.g. index.handler or main).

inputs.name: memory_size
inputs.label: Memory Size (MB)
inputs.description: The memory allocated to the Lambda function (128-10240).

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.label: Timeout (Seconds)
inputs.description: The maximum execution time in seconds (1-900).

inputs.name: environment_variables
inputs.label: Environment Variables
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated KEY=VALUE pairs to inject into the Lambda function (e.g. API_KEY=abc,STAGE=prod).

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: Additional Tags
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs for additional resource tags (e.g., team=serverless,cost-center=api).

outputs.name: api_endpoint
outputs.description: The base HTTP API endpoint URL.

outputs.name: lambda_function_name
outputs.description: The name of the Lambda function created.
